chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Appeal No.186 of 2024 Date Orders with Signatures of Judges 1. For orders on office objection, flagged. 2. For orders on MA No.1392/2025 3. For hearing of case. 4. For hearing of Ma No.3290/2024 02.05.2025. None present for the appellant. Mr. Neel Parkash, DPG Mr. Ameer Baig, Assistant, District Prison and Correctional Facility, Malir, Karachi, present in court, files a report signed by the Superintendent supported with receipt dated 30.4.2025 of Nazir, District and Sessions Court, Malir, Karachi and handwritten statement of the appellant, which are taken on record. He submits that after payment of Rs.10,000.00 as Daman amount with the Nazir of the District and Sessions Court, Malir, the appellant was released from the jail. Perusal of the handwritten statement of appellant annexed with the aforesaid report of the Superintendent, District Prison and Correctional Facility, Malir, shows that the appellant does not want to proceed with his case on merits. Accordingly, this Cr. Appeal is dismissed in above terms. Judge
